Brief_Summary: G.S. Zavid Clowes apologizes for the delay in writing to Mr. Baraize, requests original map sheets (Nos. 19 & 39) for contour reduction, and informs him of upcoming fieldwork in Luxor starting February 26th, during which he plans to visit Mr. Baraize.
English_Translation:
SURVEY OF EGYPT
GIZA (Mudiria)

18th. February, 1922.

Dear Mr. Baraize,

I must apologise for not have written sooner to
thank you for your two letters and the kind way in which
you have met my requests.

General is enclose a copy of a letter which my Director
will be good enough to let me have the originals of sheets
Nos. 19 & 39 for a few days I will arrange to have the
contours reduced from them.

I shall be glad to have these sheets as soon as
possible as I am arranging to start the field-work of
filling in contours on the unmapped area on February 26th.
and I should like to have the reductions completed in this
Office before that date.

I shall be in Luxor for several days myself from
February 26th. onwards in order to get the above work
started and I shall look forward to giving myself the
pleasure of calling on you.

With my best thanks
Yours faithfully.

G.S. Zavid Clowes.

[Handwritten Arabic: ملاحظة
م. ن.
١٩
٣٩]
Full_Transcription:
SURVEY OF EGYPT
GIZA (Mudiria)

18th. February, 1922.

Dear Mr. Baraize,

I must apologise for not have written sooner to
thank you for your two letters and the kind way in which
you have met my requests.

General is enclose a copy of a letter which my Director
will be good enough to let me have the originals of sheets
Nos. 19 & 39 for a few days I will arrange to have the
contours reduced from them.

I shall be glad to have these sheets as soon as
possible as I am arranging to start the field-work of
filling in contours on the unmapped area on February 26th.
and I should like to have the reductions completed in this
Office before that date.

I shall be in Luxor for several days myself from
February 26th. onwards in order to get the above work
started and I shall look forward to giving myself the
pleasure of calling on you.

With my best thanks
Yours faithfully.

G.S. Zavid Clowes.

[Handwritten Arabic: ملاحظة
م. ن.
١٩
٣٩]
